titleStmt.title: SII 34.180: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 180. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Kulōttuṅga I, 39th year, Kumbha, badi, Sunday, 14, Śravaṇa = A.D. 1109, January 31, Sunday.
Registers a similar gift of land after purchase as in the above inscription (No. 179) by two kaikkōḷa members of Rājarājapuram in North Koṅgu. The same local agent figures in this record also.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar
kulaitara vikkalaṉ ciṅkaṇaṉ mēl kaṭal pāyat tikkaṉaittilun taṉcakkara naṭātti vīrasiṁhāsanattu Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷōṭum
vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōvirājakēśaripanmarāna tribhuvanacakravarttikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅka cōḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 9 vatu rājamahentravaḷanā
ṭṭu mīkōṭṭunāṭṭu brahmadeyam kuḻittaṇṭalai peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm kumpa nāyiṟṟu Aparapakṣattu nāyaṟṟukkiḻa
maiyum catuddaśiyum peṟṟa tiruvōṇattināḷ Ivvūr naṭuviṟ tirumuṟṟattu rājēntracōḻaṉ tirumaṇṭapattē dharmmi ceytu kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟakkū
ṭi Iruntu Iṉnāṭṭuk kuṟunakanāṭṭuc civapāta cēkarapurattu mēlai vācalukku teṟkil Eḻunūṟṟuvaṉ maṭattilē devaraṭiyār śivayōgikaḷukkum
tapasyarkkum Amutu ceykaikku vaṭakkiṟ koṅkil rājarājapurattuk kaikkōḷaril kēraḷakēcari kōlamāṇikkum kēraḷakēcari Amarapuyaṅkaṉāna kō
ṭkalikkumāka Ivariruvarkkuñ camaintu Idharmmañ ceyvikkiṟa tiruvāṭ pōkki mahādevarkkut tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nampirāṭṭiyārai Eḻuntaruḷivit taruḷivitta nāṭaṟi
pukaḻaṉ tāmōtiraṉāna piḷḷaikkaṭiyārkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilavilaiyāvaṇam Eṅkaḷūr nilattu mahādeva vatikkukkiḻakku kaṟṟaḷivari
caikālukkut teṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu mūṉṟāñ catirattu pāratāyaṉ caṭaiyaṉ kulayaṉ nilam kha Orumā kālēkāṇiyum Ittēvaṟmē
lnilattukku teṟkaṭaiyanilam mukkāṇiyarai kāṇiyum Iṅkē nālāñcatirattu gautamaṉmar tirucuvaraṉ nilam 3 mā � ma mūṉṟumāmukkāṇiya
raikkāṇiyum Āka nilam 1/2 Iṉ nilam Araiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāna Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 3 mūṉṟum Iṉ nilattukku ca
ndrādittyaval nāṅkaḷE Iṟaiyiṟukka kaṭavOmāka Iṟai kāvalākak koṇṭakācu 2 10 Irupatum Āka kācu Irupattu mūṉṟum caṇḍeśvaradevar śrīhastat
tāṟ koṇṭu Iṉnilam Araiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttōm peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Iṉnilattukku Ituvē vilaiyāvatākavum Ikkācukku Ituvē poruḷ māvaṟuti poruṭc celavō
laiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu vēṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭ celavōlai kāṭṭakkaṭavarallātārākavum Ipparicicaiṉtu Ikkācirupattu mūṉṟum koṇṭu Iṉ nilamaraiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttōm
Iṉnāṭaṟikaḻaṉ tāmōtaranāna piḷḷaikkaṭiyārkku Ipperuṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Iṉnilam Ipramāṇappaṭiyē cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭikkoḷḷa peṟuvārāka kāśyapaṉ brahmaṇyadeva
mādhavaṉār paṇiyālum kaviṇiyaṉ cāttaṉ caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉār paṇiyālum pāratāyaṉ cīkāri māṟaṉ nārāyaṇaṉār paṇiyālum kaviṇiyaṉ nīlaṉkāṭaṉ kēcaṉār paṇiyālum kavi
ṇiyaṉ cen=tāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ subrahmaṇya bhaṭṭar paṇiyālum ppaṇippaṇiyāṟ paṇikēṭṭu Ipramāṇam Eḻutinēṉ Ivūr madhyastaṉ Eḻunūṟṟuvaṉ cōmatēvanāna samañceya
yanēṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāśyapaṉ tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇaṉ śrīkṛṣṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyaṉ nīlaṉ talaimāvuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
pāratāyaṉ kārimāṟaṉ nārāyaṇaneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ kāmakkāṇi vaṉa vāsa summukhaṉ tirunīlakaṇṭanēṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaviṇiyaṉ centāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ subrahmaṇya bha
ṭṭaṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ kaviṇiyaṉ tiruvaraṅka tēvaṉ nārāyaṇanēṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ kaviṇiyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ paṇimakaṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu rāyaṟ
brahmaṇya deva mahādevabhaṭṭasya Ippaṭi AṟivEṉ kaviṇiyaṉ śrīdharaṉ kurukūranEṉ Ippaṭi AṟivEṉ vūrākkiyaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ cīkaṇṭannEṉ Ippaṭikku pāratāyaṉ Uppaṉanā
Digital edition of SII 34.180 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
